Add-on credits available for phone, direct email, and export credits. Organization package available for annual subscriptions with minimum 5 users. Credits do not expire monthly for paid tiers (rollover enabled). Multiple currencies supported: EUR, GBP, USD.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 50 credits per month, basic Discover filters, AI Assistant in Discover, 1 email account, 500 recipients per sequence, regular support

notes: Hunter.io uses a hybrid pricing model combining flat-rate subscription tiers with usage-based credits. All paid plans include AI features. Annual billing provides 30% discount. Free tier and all paid tiers offer unlimited team members. Credits are used for email finding and verification across all tools. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales for custom pricing. Data Platform offers separate credit-based pricing starting at $6,500 for bundled search and verification credits.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 5 legally-binding eSignatures per month, 5 documents sent per month, limited templates, up to 3 rooms, no approval workflows, no custom branding, limited automation features

tiers.name: Launch
key_features: 60 documents per year (then $3 per additional doc)
Rich media drag and drop document editor

tiers.name: Starter
key_features: Rich media drag and drop document editor

notes: PandaDoc offers both per-seat and per-document pricing models. The Launch tier is usage-based with a flat monthly fee and per-document overage charges. Enterprise tier offers flexibility between per-seat or per-document pricing. Annual billing saves up to 46% compared to monthly billing. The Free tier allows 5 eSignatures and 5 documents per month. Free trial available with no credit card required. The pricing page shows two different views: Launch tier (usage-based at $9/month) and traditional per-seat tiers (Starter at $19, Business at $49). No specific AI features are mentioned in the pricing documentation.

tiers.name: CPQ+
key_features: Usage Based, Tiered, Fixed pricing models
New Business, Renewals, Co-Terminated Expansions, Amendments

tiers.name: CPQ + CLM
key_features: Digital DealRoom with Digital Sales Proposals & Contracts

tiers.name: Quote-to-Revenue
key_features: Seamless API Integration with Operational Systems

notes: DealHub does not publish pricing on their pricing page. All tiers require contacting sales for a custom quote. AI Contract Search & Insights is noted as 'coming soon' for the CPQ + CLM and Quote-to-Revenue tiers. DealHub AI is mentioned as a top feature but specific pricing integration details are not provided.

Proposify offers a per-seat pricing model with monthly and annual billing options. Annual billing provides approximately 34.5% discount off monthly pricing. All plans include AI writing features. The Business plan starts at $3,900/year and requires contacting sales for custom pricing. Free trial includes all Team plan features for 14 days. Plans have monthly send limits with overage fees available. Company mentions 'up to 4 months free' for annual billing, which translates to the annual discount shown.

Business plan includes 1 user; Enterprise plan includes minimum 10 users and requires annual billing. Annual discount of 10% applies to Business plan ($35/month annually vs $39/month monthly). API and onboarding packages available with custom quotes. Free trial is 14 days of Business plan with no credit card required. Enterprise plan has 10 user minimum.

eSign tier supports max 5 users. Professional tier has minimum 5 users requirement. AI features are included in Professional and Enterprise tiers with usage limits; unlimited AI content available as add-on. Multiple add-ons available for enhanced features across all tiers (e.g., advanced branding, CPQ, conditional content). Free trial available but duration not specified. Currency selector shows USD, GBP, EUR options.

tiers.name: Personal
key_features: Securely store and access all agreements in one place

tiers.name: Standard
key_features: Send 100 envelopes per user per year
Workplace integrations (Slack, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Stripe)

tiers.name: Business Pro
key_features: Send 100 envelopes per user per year

tiers.name: Business Pro Unlimited
key_features: Send unlimited envelopes through web app

tiers.name: Professional
key_features: Send unlimited envelopes through web app
Search, manage, and analyze unlimited agreements with AI
ai_features: Search, manage, and analyze unlimited agreements with AI

ai_feature_names: Search, manage, and analyze unlimited agreements with AI
Docusign Navigator - smart repository powered by AI

notes: DocuSign offers eSignature plans with tiered pricing. Personal plan is flat-rate ($10/month). Standard and above are per-user pricing. Annual billing offers up to 44% savings. Professional tier and above include advanced AI features for agreement management and analysis. Enhanced plans require contacting sales. Enterprise features include SSO, organization management, and compliance configurations.

Conga does not display public pricing on their pricing page. The page contains only general messaging about flexible, customized pricing and directs users to 'Get Conga pricing' with a call-to-action. All pricing requires contacting sales.

Vendavo does not display public pricing on their pricing page. The page is an archive/navigation page with product listings and resources. All products appear to be enterprise solutions requiring contact with sales. The company emphasizes AI capabilities across multiple products including Vendavo AI, Sales Optimizer with AI-powered recommendations, and AI Powered Pricing solutions.

ai_feature_names: CaptivateIQ Catalyst - Advanced modeling layer with predictive ML

notes: CaptivateIQ does not publish specific pricing on their pricing page. They use a custom, per-seat pricing model based on number of payees, compensation plan complexity, and integrations required. Pricing includes a one-time setup fee. Page states 'Contact us for a custom quote' and 'Get a Custom Quote'. Company mentions AI/ML capabilities including CaptivateIQ Catalyst (predictive ML modeling) and general 'AI at CaptivateIQ' but these are not specifically tied to pricing tiers. ASC-606 reporting is available as an add-on subscription.

tiers.name: Salesforce Spiff Additional Connectors
key_features: 1 way connection to external systems (excluding Salesforce)

tiers.name: Salesforce Spiff Premium Support
key_features: Support available via Phone, Email, Tickets, and Live Chat

notes: Pricing is per user per month with annual billing required. No monthly billing option available. Free trial not offered. Premium Support is 30% of Net Price. Additional connectors available at $250 per connector per month. Page references AI in marketing tagline ('Automate commission and motivate sales on the #1 AI CRM') but no AI-specific features are listed in the pricing tiers.

tiers.name: Growth
key_features: Deal Flagging, Overrides, and Discrepancy Resolution
Dedicated Customer Success Manager & Account Manager

tiers.name: Premium
key_features: Dedicated Customer Success Manager, Account Manager, and Data Engineer

notes: QuotaPath uses a hybrid pricing model combining per-seat charges ($35-$50 per user per month) plus a static platform fee ($525/month for Growth, $800/month for Premium). The platform fee includes the first 5 users. Prices are billed annually only. The FAQ mentions an 'Essential package' but no pricing details are provided for it on this page. Free trial is available but duration is not specified.
No pricing information is publicly displayed on this page. The company only offers demos and requires contacting sales for pricing details. This is a custom/enterprise-only pricing model.

Xactly does not publish specific pricing on their website. All tiers require contacting sales for quotes. Pricing is based on number of users and plan complexity. No self-service free trial is offered; instead, they provide tailored demos. AI features are included in Core tier (AI Assistants) and prominently featured in Ultimate tier (AI Agents & Proactive Insights). Xactly Intelligence platform extensions for AI features require separate quotes.

ai_feature_names: AI features to support admin efficiency and sales coaching

notes: Performio uses a fully custom pricing model based on team size (number of commissionable employees and admin seats), implementation scope, and selected capabilities. Pricing is determined by factors including number of plans/components, data sources/integrations, number of reports/dashboards, and advanced analytics requirements. Implementation is a one-time cost. No public tier pricing available; customers must request a pricing estimate or schedule a demo. AI features are included in all subscriptions.
